rationale: The cited paper appears only as part of a broad review of prior sales compensation studies, mainly in Table 1 where it is grouped with other work on unidimensional incentive plans. The citing article uses this citation to position its contribution (multidimensional incentives and private information) against earlier literature, but it does not build specific hypotheses, measures, identification, or methods from this particular paper. There is no distinct, paper-specific functional role beyond background framing.
